creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
fyi, someone has submitted [NEWPORT] for zabbix 2*

I grabbed it and set it suspended for now.

pr ports/168509

truly, the best thing to do is coordinate with port maintainer to do a 
repocopy to maintain cvs history.
